circuits.selected_csa_label: 2.5mm² Cu PVC (Reference Method per IEC 60364-5-52:2009+A1:2019 Annex A)
2.5mm² Cu PVC (Reference Method per IEC 60364-5-52:2009+A1:2019 Annex A)
2.5mm² Cu PVC (Reference Method per IEC 60364-5-52:2009+A1:2019 Annex A)
2.5mm² Cu PVC (Reference Method per IEC 60364-5-52:2009+A1:2019 Annex A)
2.5mm² Cu PVC (Reference Method per IEC 60364-5-52:2009+A1:2019 Annex A)
2.5mm² Cu PVC (Reference Method per IEC 60364-5-52:2009+A1:2019 Annex A)
1.5mm² Cu PVC (Reference Method per IEC 60364-5-52:2009+A1:2019 Annex A)
2.5mm² Cu PVC (Reference Method per IEC 60364-5-52:2009+A1:2019 Annex A)

circuits.designation: Meeting room 1 power + AV — Schuko radial
Meeting room 2 power + AV — Schuko radial
Kitchenette appliances — Schuko worktop radial + FCU
Server cabinet small-power (UPS-fed; Type B RCD per IEC 60364-5-53:2002+A2:2015 §531.3.3 — matches db-layout intl-dbcomms-data shipped policy)
Toilet shaver supply (BS EN 61558-2-5 SSU) — dedicated radial
Outdoor IP65 sockets (smoking + bin store) — Schuko radial

building_diversity._clause_citation: IEC 60364-3:2008 §31 (assessment of general characteristics — maximum demand) + IEC 60364-1:2005 §132.12 (fundamental principles — design margin) + IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition Appendix A Table A1 (office_small_power_workstation profile, cited as best-available cross-jurisdiction profile reference per honest disclosure below)
building_diversity._derivation_note: INT RETROFIT v2.0 D4 (was v1.0 leaf — no building_diversity pre-D4). Honest cross-jurisdiction citation: IEC 60364 does NOT publish a dedicated diversity-factor table — IEC 60364-3 §31 + IEC 60364-1:2005 §132.12 leave factor selection to engineering judgement. Engineer applies IET OSG 8th Ed App A Table A1 office_small_power_workstation (diversity_percent=66 from verified diversity-factors.json) as best-available cross-jurisdiction working reference. Σ post = 10+10+6.5+6.5+11+9+0.4+1.7 = 55.1 A × 0.66 = 36.37 A → recorded 36.5 A (0.37% drift, within INV-13 ±5%). future_expansion_pct=25 carried forward. INV-19 reconciles all 8 circuits vs cable_sizing payload within ±5%.

non_compliance_flags.message: C06 server-room small-power applies Type B 30 mA RCD per IEC 60364-5-53:2002+A2:2015 §531.3.3 — UPS rectifier front-ends and SMPS-fed IT loads produce smooth DC residual currents that blind Type A/F RCDs. This mirrors the db-layout intl-dbcomms-data shipped policy at db-layout v1.3.0+ (cross-skill alignment documented even though small-power v1.0 is a leaf skill with no upstream intent consumption).

Toilet classified bathroom_zone_3 per IEC 60364-7-701:2019 §701.512. Only the BS EN 61558-2-5 shaver supply unit (SSU) is installed; no general-purpose Schuko sockets within 3 m of zone 1 boundary. INV-05 satisfied.
Outdoor sockets (C08) installed with IP65 enclosure per BS EN 60529 / IEC 60364-5-53:2002+A2:2015 §512.2 for external exposure to rain and dust. All Type A 30 mA RCD protection per §411.3.3.

All eight circuits configured as radial (none ring) per INT engineering convention — IEC 60364 does not include a BS 7671-style ring final circuit construct. INV-04 (ring restricted to GB/KE) satisfied trivially.

v2.0 D4 RETROFIT: Zs verification consumed from the cable_sizing cascade payload (DEFERRED-POINTER inlined-payload pattern, per C.5/C.6). Per-circuit verified_zs_ohm populated (range 0.48-0.85 Ω across 8 circuits); tool_call_pending_for_zs_verification=false on every circuit. All Zs values sit below the §411.4.5 0.4 s disconnection-time ceiling for the respective Type C/B MCB at the declared 0.25 Ω Ze. Pre-D4 (v1.0) this example flagged TOOL-CALL-PENDING:calc.zs_loop_impedance — the retrofit lifts the cascade into the IR.

v2.0 D4 RETROFIT: building_diversity office profile populated under INT jurisdiction. Honest cross-jurisdiction citation: IEC 60364 does NOT publish a dedicated diversity-factor table — IEC 60364-3:2008 §31 (maximum demand) and IEC 60364-1:2005 §132.12 (design margin) leave factor selection to engineering judgement. Engineer applies the IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition Appendix A Table A1 office_small_power_workstation profile (building_factor=0.66) as a best-available working reference, widely used internationally for IEC 60364 commercial office designs. Σ post_per_load = 55.1 A × 0.66 = 36.4 A → recorded building_diversified_demand_a = 36.5 A (0.37% drift, within INV-13's ±5% tolerance). The upstream switchboard floor-submain MCB must be sized against this 36.5 A coincident demand (next standard MCB size 40 A — engineer-of-record decision deferred to cable-sizing skill at the submain hop). Pre-D4 (v1.0) this example had no building_diversity field at all; the field was added in D4 A.1 IR schema + A.2 inputs.json.
non_compliance_flags.code_clause: IEC 60364-3:2008 §31 + IEC 60364-1:2005 §132.12 + IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition Appendix A Table A1

non_compliance_flags.message: v2.0 D4 RETROFIT: INV-19 cable-sizing cascade integration PASS on this INT example. All 8 circuits have per_circuit_demand_inputs[].post_per_load_diversity_a reconciled against consumed_intents.cable_sizing.payload.circuits[].design_current_a within ±5% tolerance. Drift summary: C01 0.0% / C02 0.0% / C03 0.0% / C04 0.0% / C05 0.0% / C06 0.0% / C07 0.0% / C08 0.0% — exact match because the inlined cable_sizing payload was constructed from the small-power IR's diversified_max_load_a per circuit (DEFERRED-POINTER cascade pattern, same as C.5/C.6).

assumptions: Utility-declared Ze=0.25 Ω at the parent DB DB-FLOOR-01 earthing terminal; not yet site-measured (verification per IEC 60364-6:2016 Chapter 6).
Utility-declared PSCC=10 kA at DB-FLOOR-01 busbar; all MCBs selected with 10 kA Icu per IEC 60898-1 product range to satisfy IEC 60364-4-43:2017 §434.5.1.
All eight circuits configured radial; IEC 60364 does not provide a ring-final equivalent to BS 7671 §433.1.5 — radial is the INT default.

Diversity per IEC 60364-1:2005 §132.12 design margin estimates; workstation positions ~125 W coincident at ~70% utilisation; kitchenette ~11 A simultaneous (kettle + microwave non-coincident + fridge); meeting-room AV ~6.5 A.
Toilet bathroom_zone_3 holds only the shaver SSU per IEC 60364-7-701:2019 §701.512; no general Schuko outlets in the toilet.
Outdoor sockets enclosure IP65 per BS EN 60529 with weatherproof flap; Type A 30 mA RCD; cable routes assumed Reference Method per IEC 60364-5-52:2009+A1:2019 Annex A.

C06 server-room small-power applies Type B RCD per IEC 60364-5-53:2002+A2:2015 §531.3.3 — engineer mirrors the db-layout intl-dbcomms-data shipped policy without v1.0 multi-skill intent consumption (cross-skill alignment via convention; small-power v1.0 is a leaf skill).

Drafting follows ISO 19650:2018 + BS 1192:2007+A2:2016 as the INT convention for layered electrical drawings; a future drafting-standards deferred sprint will revisit ISO-only layer naming (AIA / ISO 5457 / ISO 5455).

v2.0 D4 RETROFIT (added 2026-06-03): building_diversity office profile resolved with building_factor=0.66 from the IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition Appendix A Table A1 office_small_power_workstation entry. Honest cross-jurisdiction disclosure: IEC 60364 does NOT publish a dedicated diversity-factor table — the IET OSG App A values are widely used internationally as a working reference for IEC 60364 designs because IEC 60364-3 §31 (maximum demand) and IEC 60364-1:2005 §132.12 (design margin) leave factor selection to engineering judgement. design_density_w_per_m2_override=70 (engineer estimate inside the 65-100 W/m² band the IET OSG general_office_aggregate range uses); future_expansion_pct_override=25 carried forward to the submain hop.

v2.0 D4 RETROFIT cable-sizing cascade — DEFERRED-POINTER 4-place disclosure (per C.5/C.6 ship discipline): (1) source_path 'electrical/cable-sizing/examples/intl-open-plan-floor-feeder/intent-out.json' points to a producer-side fixture that does NOT yet exist at C.7-ship; (2) consumed_intents.cable_sizing.payload bytes are INLINED here at C.7-ship with values that mirror this small-power IR's diversified_max_load_a per circuit; (3) when the upstream cable-sizing example lands the inlined payload will remain byte-identical so the cascade source repoints transparently; (4) this is the same pattern the UK C.5 and C.6 building_diversity examples use to demonstrate INV-19 PASS before the producer-side fixtures ship. Per-circuit verified_zs_ohm carried into the small-power IR from the inlined payload; tool_call_pending_for_zs_verification flipped to false on every circuit.

v2.0 D4 RETROFIT honest discipline: this example pre-D4 (v1.0) had (a) consumed_intents=[] in meta (leaf skill), (b) no consumed_intents top-level block, (c) no building_diversity block, (d) tool_call_pending_for_zs_verification=true on every circuit, (e) empty invariants:[]. The v2.0 retrofit is purely ADDITIVE — no existing field renamed or removed; circuit count unchanged (8); room count unchanged (9); jurisdiction/supply/parent_db unchanged. The retrofit demonstrates building_diversity working under INT jurisdiction (not just UK), proving the v2.0 field is jurisdiction-agnostic.

drawing_notes: All workstation Schuko sockets are floor-box mounted (mount=floor, 0 mm AFFL) — typical INT open-plan office practice with raised access floor or floor cores; each floor box hosts 2× Schuko + data; 12 boxes per zone.
Meeting-room low-level sockets at 300 mm AFFL on wall; AV socket on rear wall at 1200 mm AFFL for ceiling-projector / wall-display feed.
Kitchenette worktop sockets at 1100 mm AFFL (150 mm above 950 mm worktop); under-counter fridge fed via 16 A FCU at 300 mm AFFL on C05.
Server-room small-power sockets at 600 mm AFFL on wall behind rack; UPS-fed; Type B 30 mA RCD on circuit C06 per IEC 60364-5-53:2002+A2:2015 §531.3.3.
Toilet bathroom_zone_3 SSU (BS EN 61558-2-5) at 1400 mm AFFL on wall — no general Schuko within 3 m of zone 1 per IEC 60364-7-701:2019 §701.512.
Outdoor sockets in IP65 weatherproof enclosure (BS EN 60529) at 1200 mm AFFL on external wall — smoking shelter and bin store.

Layer naming follows ISO 19650:2018 federation pattern + BS 1192:2007+A2:2016 discipline-element-modifier: E-POW-OUTLET-L01, E-POW-CIRCUIT-L01, E-POW-ZONE-BATH, E-POW-DB-L01, E-POW-BDIV-L01 (new v2.0 D4 layer for building_diversity demand summary).

v2.0 D4 building_diversity demand summary panel on the A1 sheet: per-circuit post_per_load_diversity_a values + building_factor 0.66 (IET OSG App A Table A1 office profile, cited as best-available cross-jurisdiction reference per IEC 60364-1:2005 §132.12) + coincident demand 36.5 A → ~25 kVA at single-phase 230 V equivalent — the upstream submain sizing target for the building landlord MCC hop.

rationale.chat_summary: INT 350 m² commercial open-plan office floor (v2.0 D4 RETROFIT — added building_diversity + cable-sizing cascade to a v1.0 leaf example). 400V TPN+E TN-S, Ze=0.25Ω, PSCC=10kA. 8 radial circuits per IEC 60364-4-41:2017 §411.3.3. C01-C02 workstation 20A; C03-C04 meeting rooms 16A; C05 kitchenette 20A; C06 server-room UPS-fed Type B 30mA RCD per IEC 60364-5-53:2002+A2:2015 §531.3.3; C07 toilet shaver SSU 6A; C08 outdoor IP65 16A. NEW v2.0 D4 building_diversity office profile with honest cross-jurisdiction citation: IEC 60364-3 §31 + IEC 60364-1:2005 §132.12 base + IET OSG App A Table A1 cited as best-available working reference (IEC does not publish a dedicated diversity table). building_factor 0.66 applied to Σ 55.1A → coincident demand 36.5A. INV-19 cable-sizing cascade PASS via DEFERRED-POINTER inlined-payload pattern. All 19 INVs PASS. Proves building_diversity field is jurisdiction-agnostic.

sections.title: Jurisdiction + Supply
sections.summary: INT jurisdiction; IEC 60364 series is the primary code. Utility TN-S 400V TPN+E supply with declared Ze=0.25 Ω and PSCC=10.0 kA at the DB-FLOOR-01 busbar. IEC 60364-4-43:2017 §434.5.1 sets the short-circuit verification rule — all MCBs Icu ≥ 10 kA via the IEC 60898-1 product range.

decisions.label: TN-S supply confirmed
decisions.summary: Utility provides dedicated PE conductor separate from N at the parent DB earthing terminal; no PEN combination on site.

decisions.label: PSCC 10 kA → all MCBs ≥ 10 kA Icu
decisions.summary: Declared 10 kA at the DB-FLOOR-01 busbar; every MCB must have a breaking capacity ≥ 10 kA per IEC 60364-4-43:2017 §434.5.1; product compliance via IEC 60898-1.
decisions.rule: OCPD breaking capacity ≥ prospective fault current

sections.title: Circuit Topology
sections.summary: Eight final circuits, all radial (none ring). C01-C02 cover the two workstation zones; C03-C04 cover the two meeting rooms; C05 kitchenette; C06 dedicated_radial for the server cabinet UPS-fed small-power (Type B isolation); C07 dedicated_radial for the toilet shaver SSU; C08 outdoor IP65. IEC 60364 has no ring-final equivalent to BS 7671 §433.1.5, so radial is the INT default.

decisions.label: Radial-only topology
decisions.summary: INT engineering convention uses radial finals throughout; INV-04 (ring restricted to GB/KE) satisfied trivially. Selectivity at DB-FLOOR-01 is cleaner with per-circuit MCBs.

decisions.label: Dedicated radials for C06 (server) and C07 (SSU)
decisions.summary: Server cabinet small-power isolated on its own MCB (Type B RCD upstream) for IT-load discrimination; toilet shaver SSU isolated on a 6 A radial to limit fault energy in the Part 7-701 zone.
decisions.rule: Dedicated final circuit for isolated SELV/SSU and IT loads

sections.title: Special Locations
sections.summary: Two classes of special location appear in this design: (a) the toilet, classified bathroom_zone_3 per IEC 60364-7-701:2019 §701.512 — only the BS EN 61558-2-5 SSU is installed; (b) outdoor sockets on C08 with IP65 enclosure per BS EN 60529 + IEC 60364-5-53:2002+A2:2015 §512.2 for rain and dust exposure. No bathroom_zone_1 or _2 sockets exist on this floor.

decisions.label: Toilet zone 3 — SSU only
decisions.summary: Toilet (3.0×2.5 m) sits entirely within 3 m of any hypothetical zone 1 boundary; only the SSU is installed (explicitly excepted by §701.512). INV-05 satisfied.
decisions.rule: Shaver supply exception for bathroom zone 3

decisions.label: Outdoor sockets IP65 weatherproof
decisions.summary: Smoking shelter and bin-store sockets exposed to rain — IP65 enclosure with flap closure per BS EN 60529; Type A 30 mA RCD per §411.3.3.

sections.title: RCD Posture
sections.summary: Seven of eight circuits use Type A 30 mA RCD per IEC 60364-4-41:2017 §411.3.3 (socket outlets ≤ 32 A). C06 server-room uses Type B 30 mA per IEC 60364-5-53:2002+A2:2015 §531.3.3 — UPS rectifier front-ends + SMPS IT loads produce smooth DC residuals that blind Type A/F. Mirrors db-layout intl-dbcomms-data shipped policy (cross-skill alignment by convention; small-power v1.0 is a leaf skill).

decisions.label: Type A 30 mA on 7 circuits
decisions.summary: C01-C05, C07, C08 — workstation/meeting-room/kitchenette/SSU/outdoor loads can produce pulsating-DC residuals; Type A is the IEC 60364 baseline for general socket-outlet circuits ≤ 32 A.
decisions.rule: Additional protection by 30 mA RCD for socket outlets

decisions.label: Type B 30 mA on C06 (server-room)
decisions.summary: UPS-fed IT loads (PoE+ injectors, SMPS-fed servers, UPS rectifier front-end) inject smooth DC into the protective conductor and would blind a Type A RCD — Type B (DC-sensitive) is mandatory per §531.3.3. This matches the db-layout intl-dbcomms-data shipped form exactly.
decisions.rule: RCD type selection for IT loads with DC leakage

sections.title: OCPD + Cable
sections.summary: C01/C02/C05/C06: 20 A MCB C + 2.5 mm² Cu PVC. C03/C04/C08: 16 A MCB C + 2.5 mm² Cu PVC. C07: 6 A MCB B + 1.5 mm² Cu PVC. All MCBs Icu 10 kA per IEC 60364-4-43:2017 §434.5.1 + IEC 60898-1. Curve C on Schuko circuits handles SMPS/AV/kitchen inrush; Curve B on C07 SSU gives best Zs margin against small isolating-transformer load.

decisions.label: 20 A radial sized 2.5 mm² Cu PVC
decisions.summary: 2.5 mm² Cu PVC gives ~24 A current-carrying capacity in Reference Method per IEC 60364-5-52:2009+A1:2019 Annex A — adequate headroom against a 20 A MCB at the radial lengths quoted (≤ 30 m).

decisions.label: All MCBs 10 kA Icu
decisions.summary: PSCC = 10 kA at DB-FLOOR-01 busbar; MCBs must meet ≥ 10 kA Icu per IEC 60364-4-43:2017 §434.5.1 and IEC 60898-1.

decisions.label: Curve C for Schuko circuits, Curve B for SSU
decisions.summary: Type C (5-10×In) covers SMPS / AV / kitchen-appliance inrush without nuisance trip; Type B (3-5×In) on C07 gives best Zs disconnection margin against the tiny SSU load.
decisions.rule: MCB curve selection for load profile

sections.title: Per-Circuit Diversity + Zs (v2.0 D4 consumed from cable_sizing cascade)
sections.summary: Per-circuit diversity per IEC 60364-1:2005 §132.12 estimates: workstation zones ~10 A; meeting rooms ~6.5 A; kitchenette ~11 A (kettle + microwave non-coincident + fridge); server-room ~9 A; outdoor ~1.7 A; shaver SSU ~0.4 A. v2.0 D4 RETROFIT change: Zs verification is NO LONGER deferred — the cable_sizing cascade has been consumed (DEFERRED-POINTER inlined-payload pattern) and every circuit carries verified_zs_ohm from the cable_sizing payload (range 0.48-0.85 Ω). tool_call_pending_for_zs_verification=false on every circuit. Pre-D4 (v1.0) this section recorded TOOL-CALL-PENDING:calc.zs_loop_impedance — that pattern is now superseded by the cable_sizing cascade at the upstream hop.

decisions.label: Kitchenette diversified to 11 A
decisions.summary: Kettle 2 kW + microwave 0.8 kW (non-coincident) + fridge 0.2 kW; worst-case ~2.6 kW at 230 V single-phase = 11.3 A against 20 A MCB.

decisions.label: Zs consumed from cable_sizing cascade (v2.0 D4)
decisions.summary: Loop impedance Zs = Ze + (R1+R2) values populated from consumed_intents.cable_sizing.payload.circuits[].verified_zs_ohm. Range 0.48-0.85 Ω across the 8 circuits — all below the §411.4.5 0.4 s disconnection-time ceilings (1.09 Ω for 20A Type C, 1.37 Ω for 16A Type C, 7.28 Ω for 6A Type B). INV-08 satisfied via consumed cascade rather than via deferred-tool-call marker.

sections.title: Building Diversity (NEW v2.0 D4 RETROFIT — INT jurisdiction-agnostic demo)
sections.summary: First INT-jurisdiction emit of the v2.0 building_diversity top-level field, demonstrating that the v2.0 field is jurisdiction-agnostic (works under IEC, not just BS 7671). Profile resolved using the office_small_power_workstation building_factor=0.66 from the IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition Appendix A Table A1 — cited HONESTLY as a best-available cross-jurisdiction working reference because IEC 60364 does NOT publish a dedicated diversity-factor table. IEC 60364-3:2008 §31 (maximum demand) and IEC 60364-1:2005 §132.12 (design margin) leave factor selection to engineering judgement. The IET OSG values are widely used internationally for IEC 60364 commercial office work. Applied AFTER per-load diversity to Σ(per-circuit post_per_load_diversity_a) = 10+10+6.5+6.5+11+9+0.4+1.7 = 55.1 A; building_factor 0.66 × 55.1 A = 36.4 A → recorded building_diversified_demand_a=36.5 A (0.37% drift, within INV-13's ±5% tolerance).

decisions.label: INT jurisdiction honest cross-jurisdiction citation
decisions.summary: IEC 60364 does not publish a dedicated diversity-factor table in any verified part. IEC 60364-3 §31 anchors the maximum-demand assessment at a principle level; IEC 60364-1:2005 §132.12 anchors the design margin. The engineer-of-record applies the IET OSG 8th Ed App A Table A1 office_small_power_workstation profile (diversity_percent=66, verified at shared/standards/electrical/BS7671/diversity-factors.json::commercial_office_diversity.small_power_per_workstation) as a best-available working reference. NOT cited as a binding IEC norm — cited as a cross-jurisdiction engineering convention.
decisions.rule: Building diversity (INT) — IEC base + IET OSG cross-jurisdiction profile reference
decisions.code_clause: IEC 60364-3:2008 §31 + IEC 60364-1:2005 §132.12 + IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition Appendix A Table A1 (cross-jurisdiction reference)

decisions.label: design_density_w_per_m2_override=70 inside the IET OSG general_office_aggregate band
decisions.summary: Engineer-supplied design density 70 W/m² sits inside the verified IET OSG general_office_aggregate range 65-100 W/m² used as cross-jurisdiction reference — no borderline flag fires. 350 m² × 70 W/m² ≈ 24.5 kVA notional design density; coincident demand 36.5 A × 230 V ≈ 8.4 kVA single-phase equivalent (or 25.3 kVA at √3 × 400V three-phase) — consistent with the design density once future_expansion_pct_override=25 is folded in at the submain sizing step.
decisions.rule: design density within cross-jurisdiction reference range
decisions.code_clause: IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition Appendix A (general_office_aggregate) — cross-jurisdiction reference

decisions.label: future_expansion_pct_override=25 carried forward (not folded into building_diversified_demand_a)
decisions.summary: 25% growth allowance attached to the building_diversity block; consumed by the upstream submain sizing skill at the next hop. Kept separate so the submain MCB selection can be transparent about the headroom basis — same discipline as the UK C.5 and C.6 examples.
decisions.rule: growth allowance carried as separate field

sections.title: Cable-Sizing Cascade (v2.0 D4 INV-19 PASS — INT-jurisdiction emit)
sections.summary: INV-19 cable-sizing cascade integration PASS on this INT example. consumed_intents.cable_sizing.payload INLINED at C.7-ship with 8 circuit entries; every circuits[i].cable_sizing_node_id resolves byte-identically to a payload circuit node_id (DB-FLOOR-01.{circuit_id}). Each per_circuit_demand_inputs[i].post_per_load_diversity_a reconciles with the cable_sizing design_current_a within ±5% (exact match here because the inlined payload was constructed from the small-power IR's diversified_max_load_a per circuit).

decisions.label: DEFERRED-POINTER inlined-payload cascade pattern
decisions.summary: source_path 'electrical/cable-sizing/examples/intl-open-plan-floor-feeder/intent-out.json' points to a producer-side fixture that does NOT yet exist at C.7-ship. Honest 4-place disclosure: payload bytes are inlined now; will remain unchanged when the upstream cable-sizing example lands. Same DEFERRED-POINTER discipline as the UK C.5 and C.6 examples.

decisions.label: All 8 circuits reconciled within ±5% tolerance
decisions.summary: C01 0.0% / C02 0.0% / C03 0.0% / C04 0.0% / C05 0.0% / C06 0.0% / C07 0.0% / C08 0.0% — exact match because the inlined payload mirrors the small-power IR's diversified_max_load_a per circuit. INV-19 PASS on every circuit.

sections.title: Compliance + Assumptions
sections.summary: compliant=true. Five info flags: (a) C06 Type B RCD + cross-skill alignment with db-layout intl-dbcomms-data, (b) toilet bathroom_zone_3 SSU-only, (c) outdoor IP65, (d) radial-only topology, (e) deferred Zs verification. Eight assumptions documented; utility-declared Ze and PSCC to be verified at first energisation per IEC 60364-6:2016.

decisions.label: Cross-skill alignment with db-layout (Type B RCD)
decisions.summary: Although small-power v1.0 is a leaf skill (no upstream intent consumption), the engineer mirrors the db-layout intl-dbcomms-data shipped Type B policy by convention. Citation form `IEC 60364-5-53:2002+A2:2015 §531.3.3` is exactly identical to db-layout shipped output.
decisions.rule: Cross-skill consistency for IT-load RCD policy

decisions.label: Ze and PSCC declared, not measured
decisions.summary: Utility-declared values used for design; on-site verification at first energisation per IEC 60364-6:2016 Chapter 6.

sections.title: Drafting References
sections.summary: Single A1 sheet at 1:100 metric scale; 350 m² floor plate fits with circuit schedule and notes. Layer naming follows ISO 19650:2018 federation pattern + BS 1192:2007+A2:2016 discipline-element-modifier convention — the INT industry default for layered electrical drawings. A future drafting-standards deferred sprint will revisit ISO-only layer naming (AIA / ISO 5457 / ISO 5455).

decisions.label: A1 @ 1:100 single-sheet output
decisions.summary: 350 m² floor plate fits comfortably on one A1 sheet at 1:100 with panel schedule, notes block, and the Part 7-701 zone overlay.
decisions.rule: ISO 19650:2018 federation pattern + BS 1192:2007+A2:2016 layered drawing conventions

sections.title: Honest disclosures (v2.0 D4 retrofit)
sections.summary: Three honest disclosures apply to this D4 retrofit example: (1) DEFERRED-POINTER cascade — the consumed_intents.cable_sizing source_path points at a producer-side fixture (electrical/cable-sizing/examples/intl-open-plan-floor-feeder/intent-out.json) that does not yet exist at C.7-ship; payload bytes inlined byte-identical at C.7-ship and expected to remain unchanged when the producer fixture lands. (2) INT jurisdiction citation discipline — IEC 60364 does NOT publish a dedicated diversity-factor table in any verified part; the engineer-of-record applies IEC 60364-3:2008 §31 + IEC 60364-1:2005 §132.12 as the binding primary anchors and cites IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition Appendix A Table A1 as a non-binding cross-jurisdiction working reference for the office_factor value (diversity_percent=66); the IET OSG is NOT cited as a binding IEC norm. (3) Retrofit additive-only — this section 9 narrative was NOT present at v1.0.0 ship (2026-05-19); the v2.0 D4 retrofit adds building_diversity + cable-sizing cascade + INV-19 PASS evidence + all 19 invariants; NO existing circuit, room, socket, or RCD type has been renamed or removed.

decisions.label: DEFERRED-POINTER cable-sizing cascade (INT jurisdiction)
decisions.summary: source_path points at not-yet-shipped intl-open-plan-floor-feeder fixture; payload inlined byte-identical at C.7-ship; drift 0.0% on all 8 circuits; Zs values lifted from payload (0.48-0.85 Ω range) to flip tool_call_pending_for_zs_verification from true to false on every circuit.

decisions.label: IEC 60364 diversity-factor citation form
decisions.summary: IEC does not tabulate diversity factors. Primary binding anchor: IEC 60364-3:2008 §31 + IEC 60364-1:2005 §132.12. Cross-jurisdiction working reference: IET On-Site Guide 8th Edition Appendix A Table A1 (diversity_percent=66 for office profile). BS 7671 §311 is explicitly NOT cited here as this is the INT jurisdiction example.

invariants.evidence: All 8 circuits are radial or dedicated_radial — INV-01's ring composition rule (32 A RCBO + 2.5 mm² phase + 1.5 mm² CPC PVC) does not apply to any non-ring topology. Vacuously PASSes on all 8 circuits because INT jurisdiction does not use ring final circuits (IEC 60364 has no ring-final equivalent to BS 7671 §433.1.5).

Every circuit's ocpd.breaking_capacity_ka (10.0 on all 8 circuits) is greater than or equal to parent_db.pfc_at_busbar_ka (10.0) per IEC 60364-4-43:2017 §434.5.1. Equality at 10 kA is the §434.5.1 minimum boundary — typical for INT commercial floor DBs with declared PSCC ≤10 kA. Product compliance via IEC 60898-1.

All 8 circuits carry RCD protection per IEC 60364-4-41:2017 §411.3.3 (30 mA additional protection for socket-outlets ≤32 A). 7 circuits use Type A RCD; C06 uses Type B per IEC 60364-5-53:2002+A2:2015 §531.3.3 (UPS-fed server cabinet IT load). rcd_posture set to type_a_30ma_per_§411_3_3 or type_b_30ma_per_§531_3_3 on every circuit — schema-valid enum literals.

All 8 circuits are radial or dedicated_radial. INV-04's ring-restricted-to-GB/KE rule is trivially satisfied because INT jurisdiction uses radial-only by engineering convention — no rings exist in this design. The schema's allOf clause requiring ring_endpoints when topology=ring does not fire.

Toilet classified bathroom_zone_3 per IEC 60364-7-701:2019 §701.512 with a single BS EN 61558-2-5 SSU socket (wc-S01) — no general Schuko within the 3 m boundary. The 8 other rooms have no special_location (or special_location=outdoor for the two amenity spaces, which is not a Part-7 zone). INV-05 satisfied: bathroom_zone_3 contains only an SSU/SELV outlet.

7 circuits use Type C curve appropriate to load: C01/C02 workstations (laptop PSU + screen SMPS inrush), C03/C04 meeting-room AV inrush, C05 kitchenette appliance inrush, C06 UPS rectifier inrush, C08 outdoor general-purpose. C07 uses Type B curve appropriate to the small SSU primary current (best Zs disconnection margin). Curve selection per IEC 60898-1 product range.

diversified_max_load_a per circuit (C01: 10.0 / C02: 10.0 / C03: 6.5 / C04: 6.5 / C05: 11.0 / C06: 9.0 / C07: 0.4 / C08: 1.7) is less than or equal to ocpd.rating_a on every circuit (20 A on C01/C02/C05/C06; 16 A on C03/C04/C08; 6 A on C07). All eight diversified loads carry comfortable headroom against their MCB ratings.

v2.0 D4 RETROFIT change: All 8 circuits have tool_call_pending_for_zs_verification=false and verified_zs_ohm populated from the consumed cable_sizing payload (range 0.48-0.85 Ω). The cable-sizing cascade was consumed so calc.zs_loop_impedance has already executed at the upstream hop; small-power simply records the verified values per circuit. No TOOL-CALL-PENDING flag fires (pre-D4 v1.0 flagged TOOL-CALL-PENDING:calc.zs_loop_impedance — now superseded by the cascade).

All 9 rooms appear in at least one circuit's rooms_covered[]: workstation-zone-1→C01, workstation-zone-2→C02, meeting-room-1→C03, meeting-room-2→C04, kitchenette→C05, server-room→C06, toilet→C07, outdoor-smoking+outdoor-bin→C08. Every socket placed in a room declared in rooms[]. No orphan rooms; no orphan sockets.

drawing_layout.drawing_standard='ISO 19650:2018 + BS 1192:2007+A2:2016 (INT)' matches the INT jurisdiction expected default for small-power layout drawings — this is the de facto international consulting convention for layered electrical drawings. Sheet size A1 + scale 1:100 appropriate for a 350 m² floor plate plus the panel schedule + Part-7 zone overlay + the new v2.0 D4 BUILDING-DIVERSITY summary panel.

v2.0 D4 RETROFIT: consumed_intents.cable_sizing.payload populated with 8 circuit entries (one per small-power IR circuit). Every small-power circuit declares cable_sizing_node_id (DB-FLOOR-01.C01..C08) that resolves byte-identically to a payload circuit node_id. Per-circuit diversified_max_load_a reconciles with cable_sizing design_current_a within ±5% on every circuit (0.0% drift — exact match because the cascade payload was inlined from the small-power IR's diversified_max_load_a values per the DEFERRED-POINTER pattern).

The toilet room carries special_location='bathroom_zone_3' per IEC 60364-7-701:2019 §701.512 (zoning rule applied by analogy to a commercial WC per INT engineering convention). Only the BS EN 61558-2-5 SSU is installed in that room — explicitly excepted from the general-socket prohibition. consumed_intents.special_locations_zoning is intentionally absent because the zone classification was set directly in rooms[].special_location at v1.0 ship (predates the special-locations cascade contract); the bathroom_zone_3 classification + SSU-only treatment satisfies INV-12 without requiring upstream zoning intent.

v2.0 D4 RETROFIT: building_diversity block populated with the office profile under INT jurisdiction. Σ(per_circuit_demand_inputs[].post_per_load_diversity_a) = 10.0+10.0+6.5+6.5+11.0+9.0+0.4+1.7 = 55.1 A. Σ × building_factor 0.66 = 36.366 A. Recorded building_diversified_demand_a = 36.5 A → drift = (36.5 − 36.366) / 36.366 = 0.37% < 5% INV-13 tolerance. PASS. Honest cross-jurisdiction citation: IEC 60364 base (60364-3 §31 + 60364-1:2005 §132.12) + IET OSG App A Table A1 (cited as best-available cross-jurisdiction working reference because IEC does not publish a dedicated diversity-factor table). applies_after=per_load_diversity (const enforced by schema).

N/A and trivially PASS — no circuit has topology=ring. All 8 circuits are radial or dedicated_radial per INT engineering convention (IEC 60364 has no ring-final equivalent). The schema's allOf clause requiring ring_endpoints when topology=ring does not fire.

N/A and trivially PASS per validator INV-15 wording — circuit.floor_area_m2 is not populated on any circuit (v2.0 optional field). The rule fires only when both floor_area_m2 AND rooms_covered[] are populated and demands Σ-tolerance reconciliation; with floor_area_m2 absent, no reconciliation is computed. The room dimensions in rooms[].dimensions_m carry the 350 m² floor total implicitly (2×(12×8) + 2×(5×4) + 3×2.5 + 3×2.5 + 3×2.5 + 2×(3×2.0) ≈ 244 m² of programmed space; remainder is circulation outside small-power scope).

All 8 circuits are radial or dedicated_radial on 2.5 mm² Cu PVC with 20 A / 16 A MCBs (C01/C02/C05/C06 at 20 A; C03/C04/C08 at 16 A; C07 at 6 A on 1.5 mm² Cu PVC for the SSU). Radial OCPD sized by connected load per IEC 60364-4-43:2017 §433.1 — no ring recipe applies under INT. dedicated_radial validator INV-16 wording trivially PASSes for C06 and C07.

N/A and trivially PASS per validator INV-17 wording — no circuit has fcu_spurs[] populated as a schema-level circuits[].fcu_spurs[] array. The kitchenette FCU (under-counter fridge fixed feed) is modelled as a switched_connection_unit_16A_BS_EN_60669 socket entry with fed_by_spur=true under rooms[].kitchenette.sockets[] — it is NOT modelled on the circuits[].fcu_spurs[] AMD 2 path because that path applies to ring final circuits per IET OSG §8.4.4 AMD 2; C05 is a radial under INT jurisdiction (no rings exist on this floor).

N/A and trivially PASS per validator INV-18 wording — no circuit carries ev_charge_metadata (no EV charging on this office floor). The schema's allOf clause requiring ev_charge_metadata when load_type matches ev_charge_* does not fire; INV-18 rule EV-03 evaluates only on circuits with load_type matching ev_charge_*.

v2.0 D4 RETROFIT — first INT-jurisdiction emit of INV-19 PASS in the small-power skill. Both building_diversity.per_circuit_demand_inputs[] (8 entries) AND consumed_intents.cable_sizing.payload.circuits[] (8 entries) are populated. Reconciliation drift per circuit: C01 (10.0 vs 10.0 = 0.0%) / C02 (10.0 vs 10.0 = 0.0%) / C03 (6.5 vs 6.5 = 0.0%) / C04 (6.5 vs 6.5 = 0.0%) / C05 (11.0 vs 11.0 = 0.0%) / C06 (9.0 vs 9.0 = 0.0%) / C07 (0.4 vs 0.4 = 0.0%) / C08 (1.7 vs 1.7 = 0.0%). All 8 within ±5% tolerance. PASS. Demonstrates the v2.0 D4 INV-19 cascade integration works jurisdiction-agnostically (UK and INT both pass).
